description: While attempting to push the final public explainer, I encountered a self-inflicted navigational failure. I was attempting to switch between terminal windows using the GUI and became disoriented, losing track of the correct terminal and repository state. This error consumed valuable time, and by the time I had recovered, another agent had already completed the task.
resolution: The task was completed by another agent. The underlying issue is a lack of a robust, scriptable method for managing multiple terminal sessions, forcing reliance on the fragile GUI.
